Yellow quilted V-shaped leather
Silver-tone hardware
Yellow taffeta lining
Double G
Interior: 12 card slots and 3 coin slip pockets
Full zip coin pocket
Model: 837758
Size: 19cm (W) x 10.5cm (H) x 2cm (D)
Color: Yellow full leather
Made in Italy

items.name_en: !!️《Full set of original green box packaging》!!️ Creative Director Sabato De Sarno presents a new GG monogram coated fabric, creating a soft, lightweight, and durable exquisite material. This Gucci Horsebit 1955 chain wallet is presented in beige and dark brown, cleverly incorporating elegant black leather piping.
items.name_cn:
!!️《Full set of original green box packaging》!!️ Creative Director Sabato De Sarno presents a new GG monogram coated fabric, creating a soft, lightweight, and durable exquisite material. This Gucci Horsebit 1955 chain wallet is presented in beige and dark brown, cleverly incorporating elegant black leather piping.
Beige and dark brown new GG monogram coated fabric
Black leather piping
Light gold-tone hardware
Cloud fabric lining
Interior: 6 card slots, 1 flat pocket, 1 gusset zipper pocket, and 1 open pocket
1 zipper pocket
1 open pocket
Detachable chain length 58cm
Snap closure
Weight: approx. 0.3kg
Model: 621892.
Open dimensions: 19cm (W) x 21cm (H) x 2.5cm (D)
Closed dimensions: 19cm (W) x 10cm (H) x 4cm (D)
Color: Beige/pvc.
Italian creation

items.name_en: !!️《With Complete Original Green Box Packaging》!!️ GG Detail Wallet. Gucci leather goods break design boundaries, constantly reinterpreting classic pieces in a personal way. This men's wallet combines classic GG Supreme canvas with green GG accessories to create a refined accessory for modern fashion. Beige and Ebony GG Supreme canvas, green leather trim, brass hardware with green ceramic finish, GG detail cloud print fabric lining. Inside: card slot, coin pocket, 1 bill compartment. Model: 768244. Closed dimensions: 11 (W) x 9cm (H). Open dimensions: 21 (W) x 9cm (H). Color: Brown/Brown PVC. Italian creation. Weight: approx. 0.045 kg

items.name_en: !!️《With full original green box packaging》!!️【New】GG passport holder with GG details. The new collection presents slim and small leather goods, reinterpreting classic pieces with vibrant colors and a contrasting two-tone design. This passport holder is crafted from black GG Supreme canvas with a grey smooth leather interior and features four card slots. Black GG Supreme canvas, grey leather interior, brass hardware with dark grey ceramic finish, cloud print fabric lining with GG details. Inside: Four card slots and one passport pocket.

!!️《With full original green box packaging》!!️【New】GG passport holder with GG details. The new collection presents slim and small leather goods, reinterpreting classic pieces with vibrant colors and a contrasting two-tone design. This passport holder is crafted from black GG Supreme canvas with a grey smooth leather interior and features four card slots. Black GG Supreme canvas, grey leather interior, brass hardware with dark grey ceramic finish, cloud print fabric lining with GG details. Inside: Four card slots and one passport pocket.
Model: 795229.
Closed size: 13.5(L) x 9.5cm(W)
Open size: 13.5(L) x 19cm(W)
Color: Brown/Brown PVC.
Weight: approx. 0.072kg
Made in Italy

items.name_en: !!️《With full original green box packaging》!!️【New】Gucci Jackie Small Shoulder Bag. This brand-new Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag is crafted from premium leather, showcasing the brand's classic craftsmanship, crescent shape, and stylish design. The light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and matching strap with red and green stripes combine to offer more styling possibilities for this Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag made from the brand's classic black Gucci Rosso Ancora leather. Gucci Rosso Ancora leather, light gold-tone hardware, leather lining, inside: one zip pocket, Gucci logo zip pull, top handle (18cm high), detachable webbing shoulder strap (52cm high), hook closure, weight: approx. 0.4kg.
